title: Slovakian Pork Dumplings
description: A hearty Slovakian dish featuring roasted pork and homemade dumplings. Perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: Season pork cubes with salt and black pepper. Roast in the oven for 20 minutes.
While pork is roasting, prepare dumpling dough by combining flour, warm water, and caraway seeds (if using). Mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth. Wrap in plastic wrap and let rest for 10 minutes.
Divide the dough into 8-10 equal pieces. Roll each piece into a ball and flatten slightly into a disk.
Place a tablespoon of roasted pork in the center of each dumpling. Fold the dough over and press edges together to seal.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add dumplings and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Serve hot with roasted pork and your favorite sides.
